name: healthcare-app-microservices
description: Root configuration to run microservices concurrently

scripts.install:all: npm run install:api-gw && npm run install:patient && npm run install:doctor && npm run install:appointment && npm run install:telemedicine && npm run install:payment && npm run install:notification && npm run install:ai && npm run install:identity && npm run install:frontend
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run dev:patient" "npm run dev:doctor" "npm run dev:appointment" "npm run dev:telemedicine" "npm run dev:payment" "npm run dev:notification" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:identity" "npm run dev:api-gw" "npm run dev:frontend"
